title: Gastronomy Made Easy With Paulo Daumas
author: Paulo Daumas
description: We are an entertainment and education company founded in 2021. We produce documentaries, articles, interviews, podcasts, courses, and much more. Our focus is on informative and educational content related to the Gastronomy World, its production chain, and the rescue of local traditions and customs. We believe that because individuals are part of the production chain, it is necessary to identify, know and understand the demands, needs, requirements, and expectations of producers, entrepreneurs, w
